summary: Comprehensive testing of Spot'd backend (FastAPI+MongoDB) and frontend (React+Vite). 21/21 backend pytest cases passed covering health, OTP auth (request/verify/me), rate limiting (429 on 4th), 5-attempt lockout, generic entity CRUD (Create→Get→Patch→Delete with persistence verification), filter syntax, seeded data (Brendan user, profile slug=brendanbyrneofficial, score=41 percentile=99, founder subscription, Thunk casting call), recalculateSpotScore, sendVerificationCode+verifyCode, sendWelcomeEmail (welcome_email_sent flag verified), Stripe checkout (sk_test_emergent dynamic-amount mode returns valid url+session_id), founder-count (count:1 remaining:499 max:500), and founder-claim idempotency. Frontend: landing renders with dark #0D0D0D bg + electric yellow accent, /pricing has all 3 CTAs (pricing-pro-cta, pricing-elite-cta, pricing-founder-cta), /terms + /privacy render, full OTP login flow works end-to-end (email → dev_code shown → verify → JWT stored in localStorage as spotd_token → redirect to /create-profile for new users). No page errors. Only React Router v6 future-flag warnings (non-blocking).

minor.issue: Sets cookie with secure=False and samesite=lax — fine for dev/mock, but for production over HTTPS should be secure=True and samesite=none if used cross-site. Not blocking since frontend uses Bearer token from localStorage.
allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=False — works for Bearer token usage, but if cookie auth is ever needed cross-origin, must change to explicit origins with credentials=true.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1298 lines — consider splitting into modules (auth, entities, functions, stripe, seed) for maintainability (>700-line guideline).

Score recalc is invoked synchronously inside every entity create/update/delete via maybe_recalc_score, which calls recalc_percentiles() that scans all profiles — could become slow at scale; move to background task / scheduler.
JWT_SECRET is a hex string in .env which is fine, but consider documenting rotation policy.
founder-claim returns success on idempotent re-claim but does not differentiate from a fresh claim (no 'already_claimed' flag) — minor UX nit.
test_credentials: Admin OTP login via brendan@shadowwolvesproductions.com.au, dev_code returned in /api/auth/request-code response (mock mode). Token stored in localStorage as spotd_token.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created by tests; relied on backend startup seed (Brendan user/profile/founder sub/Thunk casting call). Test casting call was created with TEST_ prefix and deleted in same test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend has rate limit of 3 OTP codes per email per 10 min — use unique emails per test run. dev_code is returned in mock mode in both /api/auth/request-code and /api/functions/sendVerificationCode (email type). Stripe uses dynamic-amount checkout via emergentintegrations.payments.stripe.checkout — works with sk_test_emergent without configured price IDs. Frontend /create-profile is the post-login destination for new users; admin Brendan would land on /dashboard. Test file /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is a regression-ready pytest suite with JUnit XML output.
